svg.text: Timeline of RL for LLMs: from RLHF foundations to the DPO / RLVR / agentic-RL branch points
axis compressed before 2015 to give 2022–2025 branching room to breathe — corpus: 141 papers, 1992–2025
parallel threads (run throughout, not sequential eras)
RLHF/reward-model lineage (teal) | reward-hacking critique (orange) | self-training/RLVR-bootstrap precursor (green)
2023–2025: four branches proliferate from the same actor-critic RLHF root
Systems & infrastructure (parallel thread, not a branch of R1)
